app.name: Trubel
app.extra_stream: 4K album download as 1.99 USD one-time consumable
app.monetisation: recurring Premium subscription + one-time 4K album consumable

short.tagline: QR-code album that scans guests' camera rolls automatically after the event.
short.what_it_is: Trubel is an iOS + Android photo-album app with QR-code magic. You host a hangout (birthday, bachelorette, housewarming, flatshare party), generate a QR card, every guest scans it and just takes photos normally. After the event the app scans guests' camera rolls automatically within the time window (optional GPS radius) and collects every photo into one shared album. Optional: any host or guest can buy a 4K download of the full album as a one-time consumable.
short.who_for: Gen-Z friend-group leaders, party hosts, bachelorette and birthday planners, festival groups, study-abroad cohorts. Audience skews 18-28, heavily TikTok-leaning, iPhone-dominant (~80%).
key_features: QR-card hosting: per-event QR card, guests scan once on arrival, no app account needed.
Automatic camera-roll scan: app pulls every photo from guests' rolls within time window (+ optional GPS radius).
Shared album per event: every member sees photos as they land, comment + react inline.
World-Map public pin (Premium): discovery pin for friends-of-friends.
4K full-album download (one-time, 1.99 USD): print resolution.
business_model_lines: Two revenue streams: recurring Premium sub + one-time 4K-album consumable.
Premium pricing: ~5 EUR / month or ~30 EUR / year.
Free tier: 3 active albums, 20 photos per album, 4 members per album.
Premium unlocks: unlimited albums, photos, members + World-Map pin.
Standalone consumable: 4K album 1.99 USD per album.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Your link trubel.space/i/[handle] works on every platform. Android attribution deterministic via install-referrer. iOS warm uses Universal Links. iOS cold (~99% of creator traffic) uses our own signed-token clipboard deferred-deeplink — live-verified, no Branch.io. RevenueCat fires for BOTH Premium subs AND the 4K-album consumable — 50% of net revenue credited to your handle, sub runs 24 months, consumables credit immediately.
short.see_long_pointer: For the full walkthrough plus how the two-stream RC integration handles sub + consumable, see the Extended Brief PDF in this folder.

long.tagline: QR-code album that scans guests' camera rolls automatically after the event. Two revenue streams: sub + 4K consumable.
long.what_it_is: Trubel is an iOS + Android photo-album app with QR-code magic. You host a hangout (birthday, bachelorette, housewarming, flatshare party), generate a QR card, every guest scans it and just takes photos normally with their phone camera. After the event the app scans your guests' camera roll automatically within the correct time window (optional GPS radius) and collects every photo into a single shared album. Optional: any host or guest can buy a 4K download of the full album as a one-time consumable.
long.who_for: Gen-Z friend-group leaders, party hosts, bachelorette and birthday planners, festival groups, study-abroad cohorts. Audience skews 18-28, heavily TikTok-leaning, iPhone-dominant (~80%). Creator archetypes that convert well: birthday-recap creators, bachelorette planners, college lifestyle accounts, flatshare content, festival vloggers, camera-roll-aesthetic accounts.
key_features: QR-card hosting: per-event QR card design, guests scan once on arrival, no app account needed.
Automatic camera-roll scan: pulls every photo from guests' rolls within the time window (+ optional GPS radius).
Shared album per event: every member sees photos as they land, comment + react inline.
World-Map public pin (Premium): discovery pin so friends-of-friends can find it.
4K full-album download (one-time, 1.99 USD): full event in print resolution.
Multi-event hosting: birthdays, trips, parties — switch albums without re-onboarding guests.
business_model_lines: Two revenue streams: recurring Premium sub + one-time 4K-album consumable.
Free tier generous: 3 active albums, 20 photos per album, 4 members per album.
Premium unlocks: unlimited albums, photos, members + World-Map pin.
Standalone consumable: 4K album 1.99 USD per album (no sub required).
Free Lifetime Premium for onboarded affiliates.
pricing_lines: Premium: ~5 EUR / month or ~30 EUR / year.
4K Album: 1.99 USD per album, one-time consumable.
ASC live since May 2026; affiliate share is always 50% of the then-current price on both streams.
long.market_gap: Group-event photo collection has been broken for 10+ years. The dominant pattern ("send me your pics" group chat) loses 70% of the photos by the third day. Web-based competitors (POV.contact, FridaySnap, Lapse, JOY) require guests to install something or upload manually — friction that kills participation. Apple Shared Albums work only for iPhone users and require accounts. Trubel's automatic camera-roll scan with a privacy-windowed time + GPS filter is genuinely category-of-one. The 4K-download consumable is the second unlock — it lets the album become a tangible, archival object.
long.business_model_why_now: Two structural shifts. First, iOS PhotoKit and Android MediaStore APIs reached a maturity in 2024-2025 where time + location-windowed reads are reliable and battery-cheap. Second, Gen-Z's relationship with the camera roll has shifted from "private archive" to "shareable artefact" (TikTok carousel + BeReal aesthetic). Audience is primed for an app that treats group events as memory artefacts rather than group-chat noise. The 4K-consumable rail lets a big-event creator monetise twice on the same content.
long.why_this_works: Birthday and bachelorette content has explosive Gen-Z reach. The pain ("send me your pics" group chats that die in 4 days) is universal and concrete. Trubel's automatic camera-roll scan is genuinely category-of-one. Two revenue rails (sub + consumable) both pay the affiliate, so high-emotion-moment audiences (festivals, weddings) monetise twice.

short.tagline: QR-Code-Album das nach dem Event automatisch die Camera-Rolls der Gäste scannt.
short.what_it_is: Trubel ist eine iOS + Android Photo-Album-App mit QR-Code-Magic. Du veranstaltest ein Hangout (Geburtstag, JGA, Einweihung, WG-Party), generierst eine QR-Card, jeder Gast scannt und macht normal Fotos. Nach dem Event scannt die App die Camera-Rolls der Gäste automatisch im Zeitfenster (optionaler GPS-Radius) und sammelt jedes Foto in einem geteilten Album. Optional: Host oder Gast kann das ganze Album als 4K-Download für 1,99 USD als One-Time-Consumable kaufen.
short.who_for: Gen-Z Freundeskreis-Leader, Party-Hosts, JGA- und Geburtstags-Planer, Festival-Gruppen, Auslands-Semester-Kohorten. Audience 18-28, stark TikTok-lehnend, iPhone-dominant (~80%).
key_features: QR-Card-Hosting: per-Event-QR-Card, Gäste scannen einmal bei Ankunft, kein App-Account nötig.
Automatischer Camera-Roll-Scan: App zieht jedes Foto aus den Camera-Rolls der Gäste im Zeitfenster (+ optionaler GPS-Radius).
Geteiltes Album pro Event: jedes Mitglied sieht Fotos beim Eintreffen, kommentieren + reagieren inline.
World-Map Public Pin (Premium): Discovery-Pin damit Freunde-von-Freunden finden.
4K-Full-Album-Download (one-time, 1,99 USD): Print-Auflösung.
business_model_lines: Zwei Revenue-Quellen: wiederkehrende Premium-Sub + einmaliges 4K-Album-Consumable.
Premium-Pricing: ~5 EUR / Monat oder ~30 EUR / Jahr.
Free-Tier: 3 aktive Alben, 20 Fotos pro Album, 4 Mitglieder pro Album.
Premium schaltet frei: unbegrenzt Alben, Fotos, Mitglieder + World-Map-Pin.
Standalone-Consumable: 4K-Album 1,99 USD pro Album.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Dein Link trubel.space/i/[handle] funktioniert auf jeder Plattform. Android-Attribution deterministisch via Install-Referrer. iOS warm nutzt Universal Links. iOS cold (~99% Creator-Traffic) nutzt unseren eigenen signed-Token Clipboard-Deferred-Deeplink — live-verifiziert, kein Branch.io. RevenueCat feuert für BEIDE Premium-Subs UND das 4K-Album-Consumable — 50% des Netto-Umsatzes auf deinen Handle, Sub läuft 24 Monate, Consumables werden sofort gutgeschrieben.
short.see_long_pointer: Für das volle Walkthrough plus wie die Two-Stream-RC-Integration Sub + Consumable handhabt, siehe das Extended Brief PDF in diesem Ordner.

long.tagline: QR-Code-Album das nach dem Event automatisch die Camera-Rolls der Gäste scannt. Zwei Revenue-Quellen: Sub + 4K-Consumable.
long.what_it_is: Trubel ist eine iOS + Android Photo-Album-App mit QR-Code-Magic. Du veranstaltest ein Hangout (Geburtstag, JGA, Einweihung, WG-Party), generierst eine QR-Card, jeder Gast scannt und macht normal Fotos mit seinem Handy. Nach dem Event scannt die App die Camera-Rolls der Gäste automatisch im korrekten Zeitfenster (optionaler GPS-Radius) und sammelt jedes Foto in einem einzigen geteilten Album. Optional: jeder Host oder Gast kann das ganze Album als 4K-Download für 1,99 USD als One-Time-Consumable kaufen.
long.who_for: Gen-Z Freundeskreis-Leader, Party-Hosts, JGA- und Geburtstags-Planer, Festival-Gruppen, Auslands-Semester-Kohorten. Audience 18-28, stark TikTok-lehnend, iPhone-dominant (~80%). Passende Creator: Birthday-Recap-Creator, JGA-Planer, College-Lifestyle, WG-Content, Festival-Vlogger, Camera-Roll-Ästhetik-Accounts.
key_features: QR-Card-Hosting: per-Event-QR-Card-Design, Gäste scannen einmal bei Ankunft.
Automatischer Camera-Roll-Scan: App zieht jedes Foto im Zeitfenster (+ optional GPS).
Geteiltes Album pro Event: jedes Mitglied sieht Fotos beim Eintreffen.
World-Map Public Pin (Premium): Discovery für Freunde-von-Freunden.
4K-Full-Album-Download (one-time, 1,99 USD): volles Event in Print-Auflösung.
Multi-Event-Hosting: Geburtstage, Trips, Partys — Alben wechseln ohne Gäste neu zu onboarden.
business_model_lines: Zwei Revenue-Quellen: wiederkehrende Premium-Sub + einmaliges 4K-Album-Consumable.
Free-Tier großzügig: 3 aktive Alben, 20 Fotos pro Album, 4 Mitglieder.
Premium schaltet frei: unbegrenzt Alben, Fotos, Mitglieder + World-Map-Pin.
Standalone-Consumable: 4K-Album 1,99 USD pro Album (keine Sub nötig).
Free Lifetime Premium für onboarded Affiliates.
pricing_lines: Premium: ~5 EUR / Monat oder ~30 EUR / Jahr.
ASC live seit Mai 2026; Affiliate-Share ist immer 50% des aktuellen Preises auf beiden Strömen.
long.market_gap: Gruppen-Event-Foto-Sammeln ist seit 10+ Jahren kaputt. Das dominante Pattern ("sendet mir eure Pics"-Gruppen-Chat) verliert 70% der Fotos am dritten Tag. Web-basierte Konkurrenten (POV.contact, FridaySnap, Lapse, JOY) brauchen Gäste die was installieren oder manuell uploaden — Friction die Participation killt. Apple Shared Albums funktionieren nur für iPhone-User und brauchen Accounts. Trubels automatischer Camera-Roll-Scan mit Privacy-Window für Zeit + GPS-Filter ist genuinely Category-of-One. Das 4K-Download-Consumable ist der zweite Unlock — es lässt das Album zum greifbaren, archiv-fähigen Objekt werden.
long.business_model_why_now: Zwei strukturelle Verschiebungen. Erstens, iOS PhotoKit und Android MediaStore APIs erreichten 2024-2025 eine Reife, in der Zeit- + Lokations-gewindete Reads zuverlässig und Batterie-günstig sind. Zweitens, Gen-Zs Beziehung zur Camera-Roll hat sich von "privatem Archiv" zu "teilbarem Artefakt" verschoben (TikTok-Carousel + BeReal-Ästhetik). Audience ist bereit für eine App die Gruppen-Events als Memory-Artefakte behandelt statt Gruppen-Chat-Lärm. Das 4K-Consumable-Schiene lässt einen Big-Event-Creator zweimal am selben Content monetisieren.
long.why_this_works: Birthday- und JGA-Content hat explosive Gen-Z-Reichweite. Der Pain ("sendet mir eure Pics"-Gruppen-Chats die nach 4 Tagen sterben) ist universal und konkret. Trubels automatischer Camera-Roll-Scan ist genuinely Category-of-One. Zwei Revenue-Schienen (Sub + Consumable) zahlen beide den Affiliate, also High-Emotion-Moment-Audiences (Festivals, Hochzeiten) monetisieren zweimal.

short.tagline: Album QR-code che scansiona automaticamente i camera roll degli ospiti dopo l'evento.
short.what_it_is: Trubel è un'app foto-album iOS + Android con magia QR-code. Organizzi un hangout (compleanno, addio al nubilato, inaugurazione, festa), generi una QR-card, ogni ospite scansiona e fa foto normalmente. Dopo l'evento l'app scansiona i camera roll degli ospiti nell'intervallo di tempo (raggio GPS opzionale) e raccoglie ogni foto in un album condiviso. Opzionale: host o ospite può comprare il download 4K per 1,99 USD.
short.who_for: Gen-Z leader di gruppi di amici, host di feste, planner di addii al nubilato e compleanni, gruppi festival, coorti studio-all'estero. Audience 18-28, TikTok-leaning, iPhone-dominant (~80%).
key_features: QR-card hosting: ogni evento ha una card, gli ospiti scansionano all'arrivo, niente account app.
Scansione automatica camera roll dopo l'evento (+ GPS opzionale).
Album condiviso per evento: tutti vedono le foto in arrivo.
World-Map pin pubblico (Premium): scopri di amici-di-amici.
Download album 4K (one-time 1,99 USD): risoluzione print.
business_model_lines: Due fonti di ricavo: sub Premium + consumabile 4K una tantum.
Premium: ~5 EUR/mese o ~30 EUR/anno.
Tier gratis: 3 album attivi, 20 foto/album, 4 membri/album.
Premium sblocca: album/foto/membri illimitati + World-Map pin.
Consumabile standalone: 4K album 1,99 USD.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Il tuo link trubel.space/i/[handle] funziona su ogni piattaforma. iOS warm Universal Links. iOS cold (~99%) clipboard deferred-deeplink firmato, verificato live, senza Branch.io. RevenueCat fa fuoco per ENTRAMBI sub Premium E consumabile 4K — 50% al tuo handle, sub 24 mesi, consumabili accreditati subito.
short.see_long_pointer: Per il walkthrough completo + come l'integrazione RC two-stream gestisce sub + consumabile, vedi il Brief Esteso PDF.

long.tagline: Album QR-code che scansiona automaticamente i camera roll degli ospiti dopo l'evento. Due fonti di ricavo: sub + consumabile 4K.
long.what_it_is: Trubel è un'app foto-album iOS + Android con magia QR-code. Organizzi un hangout, generi una QR-card, ogni ospite scansiona e fa foto normalmente. Dopo l'evento l'app scansiona i camera roll nell'intervallo di tempo (+ raggio GPS opzionale) e raccoglie ogni foto in un album condiviso. Opzionale: download 4K per 1,99 USD.
long.who_for: Gen-Z leader gruppi amici, host feste, planner addii al nubilato e compleanni, gruppi festival, studio-estero. Audience 18-28, TikTok-leaning, iPhone-dominant. Archetipi creator che convertono bene: birthday-recap, planner addio al nubilato, college lifestyle, contenuto coinquilini, festival vlogger, account estetica camera-roll.
key_features: QR-card hosting.
Scansione automatica camera roll.
Album condiviso per evento.
World-Map pin (Premium).
Download 4K (1,99 USD).
Multi-event hosting.
business_model_lines: Due fonti: sub Premium ricorrente + consumabile 4K una tantum.
Tier gratis: 3 album, 20 foto/album, 4 membri/album.
Premium: album/foto/membri illimitati + World-Map pin.
Consumabile standalone: 4K album 1,99 USD.
Premium gratuito a vita per affiliati onboarded.
long.market_gap: La raccolta foto di eventi di gruppo è rotta da 10+ anni. Il pattern dominante ("mandatemi le pic" chat) perde il 70% delle foto al terzo giorno. Concorrenti web-based richiedono che gli ospiti installino o caricino manualmente — frizione che uccide la partecipazione. Apple Shared Albums funziona solo per iPhone + richiede account. La scansione automatica camera roll di Trubel con filtro tempo + GPS protetto è genuinely category-of-one.
long.business_model_why_now: Due cambiamenti. Primo, iOS PhotoKit e Android MediaStore APIs sono maturate nel 2024-2025 al punto che le letture finestrate di tempo + posizione sono affidabili e batteria-economiche. Secondo, il rapporto di Gen-Z con il camera roll è passato da "archivio privato" ad "artefatto condivisibile" (estetica TikTok-carousel + BeReal).
long.why_this_works: Birthday e bachelorette hanno reach esplosiva Gen-Z. Il dolore (chat "mandatemi le pic" che muoiono in 4 giorni) è universale. La scansione automatica camera roll è genuinely category-of-one. Due binari (sub + consumabile) pagano entrambi l'affiliato.

short.tagline: Album QR-code qui scanne automatiquement les pellicules des invités après l'événement.
short.what_it_is: Trubel est une app photo-album iOS + Android avec la magie QR-code. Tu organises un hangout (anniversaire, EVJF, pendaison de crémaillère, fête), tu génères une QR-card, chaque invité scanne et prend des photos normalement. Après l'événement, l'app scanne les pellicules dans la fenêtre temporelle (rayon GPS optionnel) et collecte chaque photo dans un album partagé. Optionnel : host ou invité peut acheter le téléchargement 4K pour 1,99 USD.
short.who_for: Leaders Gen-Z de groupes d'amis, hosts de fêtes, planners EVJF et anniversaires, groupes festival, cohortes études à l'étranger. Audience 18-28, TikTok-leaning, iPhone-dominant (~80%).
key_features: QR-card hosting : chaque événement a une card, invités scannent à l'arrivée, pas de compte app.
Scan automatique pellicule après l'événement (+ GPS optionnel).
Album partagé par événement : tout le monde voit les photos en arrivant.
World-Map pin public (Premium) : découverte par amis-d'amis.
Téléchargement album 4K (one-time 1,99 USD) : résolution impression.
business_model_lines: Deux sources : sub Premium + consommable 4K one-time.
Premium : ~5 EUR/mois ou ~30 EUR/an.
Tier gratuit : 3 albums actifs, 20 photos/album, 4 membres/album.
Premium déverrouille : albums/photos/membres illimités + World-Map pin.
Consommable standalone : album 4K 1,99 USD.
short.attribution_one_paragraph: Ton lien trubel.space/i/[handle] marche sur toutes les plateformes. iOS warm Universal Links. iOS cold (~99%) clipboard deferred-deeplink signé, vérifié live, sans Branch.io. RevenueCat se déclenche pour LES DEUX sub Premium ET consommable 4K — 50% à ton handle, sub 24 mois, consommables crédités tout de suite.
short.see_long_pointer: Pour le walkthrough complet + comment l'intégration RC two-stream gère sub + consommable, voir le Brief Étendu PDF.

long.tagline: Album QR-code qui scanne automatiquement les pellicules des invités après l'événement. Deux sources de revenu : sub + consommable 4K.
long.what_it_is: Trubel est une app photo-album iOS + Android avec magie QR-code. Tu organises un hangout, tu génères une QR-card, chaque invité scanne et prend des photos normalement. Après l'événement l'app scanne les pellicules dans la fenêtre temporelle (+ rayon GPS optionnel) et collecte chaque photo dans un album partagé. Optionnel : téléchargement 4K pour 1,99 USD.
long.who_for: Leaders Gen-Z de groupes d'amis, hosts fêtes, planners EVJF/anniversaires, groupes festival, études-étranger. Audience 18-28, TikTok-leaning, iPhone-dominant. Archétypes créateurs qui convertissent bien : birthday-recap, planners EVJF, college lifestyle, contenu coloc, festival vloggers, comptes esthétique camera-roll.

Scan automatique pellicule.
Album partagé par événement.
World-Map pin (Premium).
Téléchargement 4K (1,99 USD).
Multi-event hosting.

Premium : albums/photos/membres illimités + World-Map pin.

Premium gratuit à vie pour affiliés onboarded.
long.market_gap: La collecte de photos d'événements de groupe est cassée depuis 10+ ans. Le pattern dominant (chat "envoyez-moi vos pics") perd 70% des photos au troisième jour. Concurrents web-based exigent que les invités installent ou téléchargent manuellement — friction qui tue la participation. Apple Shared Albums marche seulement pour iPhone + exige des comptes. Le scan automatique de pellicule de Trubel avec filtre temps + GPS privacy est genuinely category-of-one.
long.business_model_why_now: Deux changements. D'abord, iOS PhotoKit et Android MediaStore APIs ont mûri en 2024-2025 au point que les lectures fenêtrées en temps + position sont fiables et économes en batterie. Ensuite, la relation de Gen-Z à la pellicule est passée d'"archive privée" à "artefact partageable" (esthétique TikTok-carrousel + BeReal).
long.why_this_works: Birthday et bachelorette ont reach explosive Gen-Z. La douleur (chats "envoyez-moi vos pics" qui meurent en 4 jours) est universelle. Le scan automatique de pellicule est genuinely category-of-one. Deux rails (sub + consommable) payent tous les deux l'affilié.

short.tagline: Álbum QR-code que escanea automáticamente los rollos de cámara de los invitados después del evento.
short.what_it_is: Trubel es una app foto-álbum iOS + Android con magia QR-code. Organizas un hangout (cumpleaños, despedida de soltera, inauguración, fiesta), generas una QR-card, cada invitado escanea y hace fotos normalmente. Después del evento la app escanea los rollos de cámara en la ventana de tiempo (radio GPS opcional) y recoge cada foto en un álbum compartido. Opcional: anfitrión o invitado puede comprar la descarga 4K por 1,99 USD.
short.who_for: Líderes Gen-Z de grupos de amigos, anfitriones de fiestas, planners de despedidas y cumpleaños, grupos festival, cohortes estudio-extranjero. Audiencia 18-28, TikTok-leaning, iPhone-dominante (~80%).

Escaneo automático del rollo después del evento (+ GPS opcional).
Álbum compartido por evento: todos ven las fotos al llegar.
World-Map pin público (Premium): descubrimiento por amigos-de-amigos.
Descarga álbum 4K (one-time 1,99 USD): resolución impresión.
business_model_lines: Dos fuentes: sub Premium + consumible 4K one-time.
Premium: ~5 EUR/mes o ~30 EUR/año.
Nivel gratis: 3 álbumes activos, 20 fotos/álbum, 4 miembros/álbum.
Premium desbloquea: álbumes/fotos/miembros ilimitados + World-Map pin.
Consumible standalone: álbum 4K 1,99 USD.

RevenueCat se dispara para AMBOS sub Premium Y consumible 4K — 50% a tu handle, sub 24 meses, consumibles acreditados al instante.

long.market_gap: La recolección de fotos de eventos grupales lleva 10+ años rota. El patrón dominante (chat "mandadme las pics") pierde el 70% de las fotos al tercer día. Competidores web-based requieren que invitados instalen o suban manualmente — fricción que mata la participación. Apple Shared Albums solo funciona para iPhone + requiere cuentas. El escaneo automático de rollo de Trubel con filtro tiempo + GPS privacy es genuinely category-of-one.
long.business_model_why_now: Dos cambios. Primero, iOS PhotoKit y Android MediaStore APIs maduraron en 2024-2025 al punto que las lecturas con ventana de tiempo + ubicación son fiables y económicas en batería. Segundo, la relación de Gen-Z con el rollo pasó de "archivo privado" a "artefacto compartible" (estética TikTok-carrusel + BeReal).
long.why_this_works: Birthday y bachelorette tienen alcance explosivo Gen-Z. El dolor (chats "mandadme las pics" que mueren en 4 días) es universal. El escaneo automático del rollo es genuinely category-of-one. Dos vías (sub + consumible) pagan ambas al afiliado.

en.subtitle: for creators who plan birthdays, bachelorettes and friend-group events
en.hero_quote: Drop a QR, all photos collect themselves. Earn from birthday recaps you'd post anyway.
en.sixty_seconds_intro: Trubel is an iOS + Android app for photo albums with QR-code magic. Host a hangout, generate a QR card, every guest scans + takes photos normally. After the event the app scans guests' camera rolls within the time window (optional GPS) and collects every photo into one album. App Store live since May 2026. Two revenue rails: 5 EUR/m or 30 EUR/y Premium sub PLUS 1.99 USD 4K album consumable.
en.why_this_works: "Send me your pics" group chats die in 4 days. Apple Shared Albums require all-iPhone + accounts. Trubel's automatic camera-roll scan handles it without guests installing or uploading anything. Two payout rails on one reel.
free_vs_premium: Free: 3 active albums, 20 photos per album, 4 members per album.
Premium (~5 EUR/m or ~30 EUR/y): unlimited albums, photos, members + World-Map pin.
Standalone: 4K-album 1.99 USD per album (no sub required).
Free Lifetime Premium for onboarded affiliates.
en.creator_types_intro: Find your row. Trubel pays TWICE on a converted viewer — sub (24 months) AND per 4K-album purchase. The numbers below are sub-only; consumable adds 5-20 events at 1.99 USD each.

creator_types_table.hooks: Real bachelorette recap with QR card moment; "how I run birthdays now"; before/after group-chat-vs-Trubel
Day-in-the-life with the QR on the table; "all photos from one night, one tap"; semester recap
Trubel album as IG carousel; slow-mo recap; "the camera roll I didn't have to chase"
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 1-2%, lower CTR but high posting cadence

creator_types_table.hooks: Multi-day festival album recap; QR on the wristband; "everyone's photos, not just mine"
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 2-4%, festival audience converts on consumable too

creator_types_table.hooks: Bachelorette-weekend album reveal; "the bride saw 600 photos"; QR card unboxing
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 3-5% in wedding niches, very high consumable attach

creator_types_table.hooks: "POV: every birthday group chat ever"; chaotic photo-request screenshots cut to Trubel

ugc_strategy.archetype: You at the actual event. Birthday host showing the QR card on the table. Bachelorette planner with the bride. College lifestyle creator at the party. Sokolova and Kefi (2020) found parasocial trust is what moves Gen-Z lifestyle conversion.
hook_examples: "I ran my friend's bachelorette and got every single photo back" — recap reel with you in frame.
"This is how I do birthdays now" — straight to camera at the table with the QR card.
"600 photos from a weekend I would have lost" — emotional payoff, bride seeing the album.
"POV: hosting a party in 2026" — happy-host vibes, QR moment in the middle.
"The QR card I brought to my flatshare housewarming" — kitchen setup, the card, album after.
"Why I stopped sending 'send me your pics'" — talking head, app as B-roll.
"Three months of using this for every event" — retrospective.
"The bride saw photos she never would have" — emotional reel.
format_templates: Recap reel 60-90s: at the event → QR card moment → album reveal.
do_dont: Do: post the actual album content.
Do: link sticker on the recap story.
Don't: stage the QR moment artificially.
Don't: skip the consumable mention if it fits.

faceless_strategy.archetype: Camera-roll-aesthetic creator. IG carousel maker. Slow-motion recap creator. You're behind the camera, the album does the talking. Trubel's product output IS aesthetic photography.
hook_examples: Trubel album as 10-slide IG carousel.
Slow-mo recap with photo-grid reveal.
"Camera roll I didn't have to chase" — silent screen-rec.
"POV typing: hosting a party" — hands only.
Time-lapse of guests scanning the QR.
Stop-motion: photos sliding into the album.
ASMR-adjacent: QR scan sounds, gentle music.
Tutorial carousel: "How to set up a Trubel album".
do_dont: Do: use real album photos with consent.
Do: link in caption AND IG bio.
Don't: trending TikTok audio as only hook.

audience_fit_good: Bachelorette / wedding planners (very high consumable attach).
audience_fit_poor: Privacy-purist audiences (opt-in but concept scares them).
en.posting_cadence: Gen-Z: Thursday evening 19-22h CET + Saturday morning 9-11h CET. Wedding niche: Sunday evening. Festival niche: real-time during festival season. 1 reel per event. Story sequences before/during/after drive most conversions.
en.conversion_math: 50% rev share, 24 months on subs + 50% on every 4K consumable. Premium ~5 EUR/m or ~30 EUR/y. 4K 1.99 USD/album. Birthday-planner reel (50k followers): 30,000 views x 1.5% CTR = 450 clicks, 35% install = 158 installs, 4% Premium = 6 subs (~180 EUR/yr) + 30 consumables x ~5 EUR = ~75 USD = ~225-250 EUR total per reel. Wedding macro (300k IG): reach 120,000 x 1.2% CTR = 1,440 clicks, 25% install = 360 installs, 5% Premium = 18 subs (~540 EUR) + 80 consumables = ~80 USD = ~600+ EUR. Festival vlogger (200k TT): 100,000 views x 1% CTR = 1,000 clicks, 30% install = 300 installs, 3% Premium = 9 subs + 60 consumables (~330 EUR).
en.brand_assets: Logo, QR card templates, app screenshots, B-roll, colour palette and ready-made captions: getklar.org/i/trubel/brand-assets.
faq: RC fires when a user buys the 4K-album consumable. Webhook looks up the attribution row and credits 50% of net consumable revenue to your handle. No time cap on consumables.
Do I need to mention the consumable?
Not required. But "and you can grab a 4K download of the whole album for 2 bucks" often increases per-event revenue.
Camera-roll scan is opt-in. Guests scan QR, app explains time + GPS window, they accept or decline. Describe honestly.
Yes. 24 months per converted user on subs, no cap on consumable purchases.
Mid-tier $150-800 per post, macros $800+. Rev-share stays on top.
You earn 50% on the then-current price for both rails.
en.closing: Honest read: Trubel fits creators whose content already centres on group events. If your content is solo creator-stuff, this is not a fit and that's a real answer. We'd rather have 20 well-fit Gen-Z creators than 200 random ones. Reply to Mail 2 either way.

de.subtitle: für Creator die Geburtstage, JGAs und Freundeskreis-Events planen
de.hero_quote: QR droppen, alle Fotos sammeln sich selbst. Verdien an Birthday-Recaps die du eh postest.
de.sixty_seconds_intro: Trubel ist eine iOS + Android-App für Photo-Alben mit QR-Code-Magic. Du veranstaltest ein Hangout, generierst eine QR-Card, jeder Gast scannt + macht normal Fotos. Nach dem Event scannt die App die Camera-Rolls der Gäste im Zeitfenster (optional GPS) und sammelt jedes Foto in einem Album. App Store live seit Mai 2026. Zwei Revenue-Schienen: 5 EUR/m oder 30 EUR/y Premium-Sub PLUS 1,99 USD 4K-Album-Consumable.
de.why_this_works: "Sendet mir eure Pics"-Gruppen-Chats sterben in 4 Tagen. Apple Shared Albums brauchen all-iPhone + Accounts. Trubels automatischer Camera-Roll-Scan handelt das ohne dass Gäste was installieren oder uploaden. Zwei Payout-Schienen auf einem Reel.
free_vs_premium: Free: 3 aktive Alben, 20 Fotos pro Album, 4 Mitglieder pro Album.
Premium (~5 EUR/m oder ~30 EUR/y): unbegrenzt Alben, Fotos, Mitglieder + World-Map-Pin.
Standalone: 4K-Album 1,99 USD pro Album (keine Sub nötig).
Free Lifetime Premium für onboarded Affiliates.
de.creator_types_intro: Finde deine Zeile. Trubel zahlt ZWEIMAL pro konvertiertem Viewer — Sub (24 Monate) UND pro 4K-Album-Kauf. Die Zahlen unten sind nur Sub; Consumable addiert 5-20 Events zu 1,99 USD je.

creator_types_table.hooks: Echter JGA-Recap mit QR-Card-Moment; "wie ich Geburtstage jetzt mache"; Vorher/Nachher Gruppen-Chat-vs-Trubel

Multi-Day-Festival-Album-Recap; QR am Wristband; "alle Fotos, nicht nur meine"

ugc_strategy.archetype: Du auf dem echten Event. Geburtstags-Host der QR-Card auf dem Tisch zeigt. JGA-Planer mit der Braut. College-Lifestyle-Creator auf der Party. Sokolova und Kefi (2020) fanden parasoziales Vertrauen bewegt Gen-Z-Lifestyle-Conversion.
hook_examples: "Ich habe den JGA meiner Freundin geplant und jedes einzelne Foto zurückbekommen" — Recap-Reel mit dir im Bild.
"So mache ich Geburtstage jetzt" — direkt zur Kamera mit der QR-Card am Tisch.
"600 Fotos von einem Wochenende die ich verloren hätte" — emotionaler Payoff, Braut sieht das Album.
"POV: Party hosten in 2026" — Happy-Host-Vibe, QR-Moment in der Mitte.
"Die QR-Card auf meiner WG-Einweihung" — Küchen-Setup, die Card, Album danach.

"Drei Monate diese App für jedes Event" — Retrospektive.
"Die Braut sah Fotos die sie nie gesehen hätte" — emotionales Reel.
do_dont: Don't: die Consumable-Erwähnung skippen wenn es passt.

faceless_strategy.archetype: Camera-Roll-Ästhetik-Creator. IG-Carousel-Maker. Slow-Motion-Recap-Creator. Du bist hinter der Kamera, das Album spricht. Trubels Produkt-Output IST ästhetische Photographie.
hook_examples: Trubel-Album als 10-Slide IG-Carousel.
Slow-Mo-Recap mit Photo-Grid-Reveal.

Time-Lapse der Gäste die QR scannen.

Tutorial-Carousel: "Wie man ein Trubel-Album aufsetzt".
do_dont: Do: Link in Caption UND IG-Bio.

de.conversion_math: 50% Rev-Share, 24 Monate auf Subs + 50% auf jedes 4K-Consumable. Premium ~5 EUR/m oder ~30 EUR/y. 4K 1,99 USD/Album. Birthday-Planer-Reel (50k Follower): 30.000 Views x 1,5% CTR = 450 Clicks, 35% Install = 158 Installs, 4% Premium = 6 Subs (~180 EUR/Jahr) + 30 Consumables x ~5 EUR = ~75 USD = ~225-250 EUR pro Reel. Hochzeits-Macro (300k IG): Reach 120.000 x 1,2% CTR = 1.440 Clicks, 25% Install = 360 Installs, 5% Premium = 18 Subs (~540 EUR) + 80 Consumables = ~80 USD = ~600+ EUR. Festival-Vlogger (200k TT): 100.000 Views x 1% CTR = 1.000 Clicks, 30% Install = 300 Installs, 3% Premium = 9 Subs + 60 Consumables (~330 EUR).
de.brand_assets: Logo, QR-Card-Templates, App-Screenshots, B-Roll, Farbpalette und fertige Captions: getklar.org/i/trubel/brand-assets.
faq: RC feuert wenn ein User das 4K-Album-Consumable kauft. Webhook sucht die Attribution-Row und creditiert 50% des Netto-Consumable-Umsatzes auf deinen Handle. Keine Zeit-Cap auf Consumables.
Nicht nötig. Aber "und du kannst den 4K-Download des ganzen Albums für 2 Mücken kriegen" erhöht oft den Per-Event-Umsatz.
Camera-Roll-Scan ist opt-in. Gäste scannen QR, App erklärt Zeit + GPS-Window, sie akzeptieren oder lehnen ab. Beschreibe ehrlich.
Ja. 24 Monate pro konvertiertem User auf Subs, keine Cap auf Consumable-Käufe.
Mid-Tier $150-800 pro Post, Macros $800+. Rev-Share bleibt obendrauf.
Du verdienst 50% auf den aktuellen Preis auf beiden Schienen.
de.closing: Ehrlich: Trubel passt zu Creator deren Content sich um Gruppen-Events dreht. Wenn dein Content Solo-Creator-Zeug ist, passt nicht und das ist eine ehrliche Antwort. Wir wollen lieber 20 well-fit Gen-Z-Creator als 200 random ones. Antworte auf Mail 2 so oder so.

it.subtitle: per creator che pianificano compleanni, addii al nubilato ed eventi tra amici
it.hero_quote: Lascia un QR, tutte le foto si raccolgono da sole. Guadagna dai birthday-recap che faresti comunque.
it.sixty_seconds_intro: Trubel è un'app iOS + Android per foto-album con magia QR-code. Organizzi un hangout, generi una QR-card, ogni ospite scansiona + fa foto normalmente. Dopo l'evento l'app scansiona i camera roll nella finestra di tempo (GPS opzionale) e raccoglie ogni foto in un album. App Store live da maggio 2026. Due binari: 5 EUR/m o 30 EUR/y Premium PIÙ 1,99 USD consumabile album 4K.
it.why_this_works: Chat di gruppo "mandatemi le pic" muoiono in 4 giorni. Apple Shared Albums richiede tutti-iPhone + account. Lo scan automatico di Trubel funziona senza che gli ospiti installino o caricino nulla. Due binari su un reel.
free_vs_premium: Gratis: 3 album attivi, 20 foto/album, 4 membri/album.
Premium (~5 EUR/m o ~30 EUR/y): album/foto/membri illimitati + World-Map pin.
Standalone: 4K album 1,99 USD (no sub).
Premium gratuito a vita per affiliati onboarded.
it.creator_types_intro: Trova la tua riga. Trubel paga DUE VOLTE — sub (24 mesi) + ogni acquisto consumabile 4K. Numeri sotto sono solo sub; consumabile aggiunge 5-20 eventi a 1,99 USD.

creator_types_table.hooks: Recap addio al nubilato con QR-card; "come faccio i compleanni adesso"; prima/dopo chat-vs-Trubel
Day-in-the-life con QR sul tavolo; "tutte le foto di una sera, un tap"; recap semestre
Album Trubel come IG carousel; recap slow-mo; "il camera roll che non ho dovuto rincorrere"
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 1-2%, CTR più basso ma alta frequenza

creator_types_table.hooks: Recap album multi-giorno festival; QR sul braccialetto; "foto di tutti, non solo le mie"
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 2-4%, audience festival converte anche su consumabile

creator_types_table.hooks: Reveal album weekend addio; "la sposa ha visto 600 foto"; unboxing QR-card
"POV: ogni chat di gruppo compleanno mai"; screenshot caotici cut a Trubel

ugc_strategy.archetype: Tu all'evento vero. Host del compleanno che mostra la QR-card sul tavolo. Planner addio con la sposa. Sokolova e Kefi (2020): fiducia parasociale muove conversione lifestyle Gen-Z.
hook_examples: "Ho organizzato l'addio della mia amica e ho riavuto ogni singola foto" — recap-reel con te in frame.
"Così faccio i compleanni adesso" — dritto a camera al tavolo con la QR-card.
"600 foto da un weekend che avrei perso" — payoff emotivo, sposa che vede l'album.
"POV: ospite di una festa nel 2026" — vibe happy-host, momento QR.
"Perché ho smesso di scrivere 'mandatemi le pic'" — talking head, app come B-roll.
format_templates: Recap reel 60-90s: evento → momento QR-card → album reveal.
do_dont: Do: posta il vero contenuto album.
Don't: inscenare il momento QR artificialmente.
Don't: saltare il consumabile se calza.

faceless_strategy.archetype: Creator estetica camera-roll. IG carousel maker. L'output di Trubel È fotografia estetica.
hook_examples: Album Trubel come IG carousel 10-slide.
Recap slow-mo con reveal griglia foto.
"Camera roll che non ho dovuto rincorrere" — screen-rec silenzioso.
"POV digitando: organizzare una festa" — solo mani.
Time-lapse degli ospiti che scansionano il QR.
ASMR-adjacent: suoni scan QR, musica gentile.
do_dont: Do: foto vere album con consenso.
Do: link in caption E IG-bio.

it.posting_cadence: Gen-Z: giovedì sera 19-22h CET + sabato mattina 9-11h CET. Nicchia matrimoni: domenica sera. Festival: real-time. 1 reel per evento. Story-sequence prima/durante/dopo guidano la maggioranza delle conversioni.
it.conversion_math: 50% rev-share, 24 mesi sub + 50% su ogni consumabile 4K. Premium ~5 EUR/m o ~30 EUR/y. 4K 1,99 USD/album. Birthday-planner reel (50k follower): 30.000 view x 1,5% CTR = 450 clic, 35% install = 158 install, 4% Premium = 6 abbonati (~180 EUR/anno) + 30 consumabili x ~5 EUR = ~75 USD = ~225-250 EUR totali per reel. Matrimonio macro (300k IG): reach 120.000 x 1,2% CTR = 1.440 clic, 25% install = 360 install, 5% Premium = 18 abbonati (~540 EUR) + 80 consumabili = ~80 USD = ~600+ EUR. Festival vlogger (200k TT): 100.000 view x 1% CTR = 1.000 clic, 30% install = 300 install, 3% Premium = 9 abbonati + 60 consumabili (~330 EUR).
it.brand_assets: Logo, template QR-card, screenshot app, B-roll, palette colori e caption pronte: getklar.org/i/trubel/brand-assets.
faq: RC fa fuoco quando l'utente compra il consumabile 4K. Webhook cerca la riga di attribuzione e accredita 50% al tuo handle. Nessun cap temporale sui consumabili.
Non richiesto. Ma "e puoi prenderti il download 4K dell'album per 2 dollari" spesso aumenta il ricavo per evento.
Lo scan è opt-in. Ospiti scansionano QR, app spiega finestra tempo + GPS, accettano o rifiutano. Descrivi onestamente.
Sì. 24 mesi per utente convertito sub, nessun cap sui consumabili.
Guadagni 50% sul prezzo del momento su entrambi i binari.
it.closing: Onestà: Trubel va bene con creator il cui contenuto già ruota attorno a eventi di gruppo. Se il tuo contenuto è solo-creator, non va bene ed è una risposta onesta. Preferiamo 20 creator ben-fit a 200 random. Rispondi alla Mail 2 in ogni caso.

fr.subtitle: pour les créateurs qui planifient anniversaires, EVJF et événements entre amis
fr.hero_quote: Drop un QR, toutes les photos se collectent toutes seules. Gagne sur les birthday-recaps que tu posterais de toute façon.
fr.sixty_seconds_intro: Trubel est une app iOS + Android pour albums photo avec magie QR-code. Tu organises un hangout, tu génères une QR-card, chaque invité scanne + prend des photos normalement. Après l'événement l'app scanne les pellicules dans la fenêtre temporelle (GPS optionnel) et collecte chaque photo dans un album. App Store live depuis mai 2026. Deux rails : 5 EUR/m ou 30 EUR/y Premium PLUS 1,99 USD consommable album 4K.
fr.why_this_works: Chats de groupe "envoyez-moi vos pics" meurent en 4 jours. Apple Shared Albums exige tout-iPhone + comptes. Le scan auto de Trubel fonctionne sans que les invités installent ou téléchargent. Deux rails sur un reel.
free_vs_premium: Gratuit : 3 albums actifs, 20 photos/album, 4 membres/album.
Premium (~5 EUR/m ou ~30 EUR/y) : albums/photos/membres illimités + World-Map pin.
Standalone : album 4K 1,99 USD (sans sub).

Birthday-planner reel (50k abonnés) : 30 000 vues x 1,5% CTR = 450 clics, 35% install = 158 installs, 4% Premium = 6 abonnés (~180 EUR/an) + 30 consommables x ~5 EUR = ~75 USD = ~225-250 EUR total par reel. faq: RC se déclenche quand l'utilisateur achète le consommable 4K. Webhook cherche la ligne d'attribution et crédite 50% à ton handle. Pas de cap temporel sur les consommables.
Pas obligatoire. Mais "et tu peux prendre le téléchargement 4K de l'album pour 2 balles" augmente souvent le revenu par événement.
Le scan est opt-in. Invités scannent QR, app explique fenêtre temps + GPS, ils acceptent ou refusent. Décris honnêtement.
Oui. 24 mois par utilisateur converti sub, pas de cap sur consommables.
Tu touches 50% sur le prix du moment sur les deux rails.
fr.closing: Honnêtement : Trubel colle avec créateurs dont le contenu tourne déjà autour d'événements de groupe. Si ton contenu c'est solo-créateur, ça ne colle pas et c'est une réponse honnête. On préfère 20 créateurs bien-fit à 200 random. Réponds à la Mail 2 dans tous les cas.

es.subtitle: para creators que planifican cumpleaños, despedidas y eventos entre amigos
es.hero_quote: Suelta un QR, todas las fotos se recogen solas. Gana de los birthday-recaps que postearías igual.
es.sixty_seconds_intro: Trubel es una app iOS + Android para álbumes foto con magia QR-code. Organizas un hangout, generas una QR-card, cada invitado escanea + hace fotos normalmente. Después del evento la app escanea los rollos en la ventana de tiempo (GPS opcional) y recoge cada foto en un álbum. App Store live desde mayo 2026. Dos vías: 5 EUR/m o 30 EUR/y Premium MÁS 1,99 USD consumible álbum 4K.
es.why_this_works: Chats de grupo "mandadme las pics" mueren en 4 días. Apple Shared Albums requiere todos-iPhone + cuentas. El escaneo auto de Trubel funciona sin que los invitados instalen o suban nada. Dos vías en un reel.
free_vs_premium: Gratis: 3 álbumes activos, 20 fotos/álbum, 4 miembros/álbum.
Premium (~5 EUR/m o ~30 EUR/y): álbumes/fotos/miembros ilimitados + World-Map pin.
Standalone: álbum 4K 1,99 USD (sin sub).
Premium gratis de por vida para afiliados onboarded.
es.creator_types_intro: Encuentra tu fila. Trubel paga DOS VECES — sub (24 meses) + cada compra consumible 4K. Los números abajo son solo sub; consumible añade 5-20 eventos a 1,99 USD.

creator_types_table.hooks: Recap despedida con QR-card; "cómo hago cumpleaños ahora"; antes/después chat-vs-Trubel
Day-in-the-life con QR sobre la mesa; "todas las fotos de una noche, un tap"; recap semestre
Álbum Trubel como IG carrusel; recap slow-mo; "el rollo que no tuve que perseguir"
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 1-2%, CTR más bajo pero alta frecuencia

creator_types_table.hooks: Recap álbum multi-día festival; QR en la pulsera; "las fotos de todos, no solo las mías"
creator_types_table.expected_conversion: 2-4%, audiencia festival convierte también en consumible

creator_types_table.hooks: Reveal álbum fin de semana despedida; "la novia vio 600 fotos"; unboxing QR-card
"POV: cada chat de grupo de cumpleaños jamás"; capturas caóticas cut a Trubel

ugc_strategy.archetype: Tú en el evento real. Anfitrión de cumpleaños mostrando la QR-card en la mesa. Planner despedida con la novia. Sokolova y Kefi (2020): confianza parasocial mueve conversión lifestyle Gen-Z.
hook_examples: "Organicé la despedida de mi amiga y recuperé cada foto" — recap-reel contigo en cuadro.
"Así hago cumpleaños ahora" — directo a cámara en la mesa con la QR-card.
"600 fotos de un fin de semana que habría perdido" — payoff emocional, novia que ve el álbum.
"POV: anfitriando una fiesta en 2026" — vibe happy-host, momento QR.
"Por qué dejé de escribir 'mandadme las pics'" — talking head, app como B-roll.
format_templates: Recap reel 60-90s: evento → momento QR-card → álbum reveal.
do_dont: Do: postea el contenido real del álbum.
Do: sticker enlace en la story recap.
Don't: escenificar el momento QR artificialmente.
Don't: saltarse el consumible si encaja.

faceless_strategy.archetype: Creator estética camera-roll. IG carrusel maker. El output de Trubel ES fotografía estética.
hook_examples: Álbum Trubel como IG carrusel 10-slide.
Recap slow-mo con reveal cuadrícula foto.
"Rollo que no tuve que perseguir" — screen-rec silencioso.
"POV tecleando: anfitriando una fiesta" — solo manos.
Time-lapse de invitados escaneando el QR.
ASMR-adjacent: sonidos escaneo QR, música suave.
do_dont: Do: fotos reales del álbum con consentimiento.
Do: enlace en caption Y IG-bio.

es.posting_cadence: Gen-Z: jueves noche 19-22h CET + sábado mañana 9-11h CET. Nicho boda: domingo noche. Festival: tiempo real. 1 reel por evento. Story-secuencias antes/durante/después traen la mayoría de las conversiones.
es.conversion_math: 50% rev-share, 24 meses sub + 50% en cada consumible 4K. Premium ~5 EUR/m o ~30 EUR/y. 4K 1,99 USD/álbum. Birthday-planner reel (50k seguidores): 30.000 vistas x 1,5% CTR = 450 clics, 35% install = 158 instalaciones, 4% Premium = 6 suscriptores (~180 EUR/año) + 30 consumibles x ~5 EUR = ~75 USD = ~225-250 EUR totales por reel. Boda macro (300k IG): alcance 120.000 x 1,2% CTR = 1.440 clics, 25% install = 360 instalaciones, 5% Premium = 18 suscriptores (~540 EUR) + 80 consumibles = ~80 USD = ~600+ EUR. Festival vlogger (200k TT): 100.000 vistas x 1% CTR = 1.000 clics, 30% install = 300 instalaciones, 3% Premium = 9 suscriptores + 60 consumibles (~330 EUR).
es.brand_assets: Logo, plantillas QR-card, capturas app, B-roll, paleta de color y captions listos: getklar.org/i/trubel/brand-assets.
faq: RC se dispara cuando el usuario compra el consumible 4K. Webhook busca la fila de atribución y acredita 50% a tu handle. Sin cap temporal en consumibles.
No es obligatorio. Pero "y puedes pillarte la descarga 4K del álbum por 2 pavos" suele aumentar el ingreso por evento.
El escaneo es opt-in. Invitados escanean QR, app explica ventana tiempo + GPS, aceptan o rechazan. Descríbelo honestamente.
Sí. 24 meses por usuario convertido sub, sin cap en consumibles.
Ganas 50% sobre el precio del momento en ambas vías.
es.closing: Honestamente: Trubel encaja con creators cuyo contenido ya gira en torno a eventos grupales. Si tu contenido es solo-creator, no encaja y es una respuesta honesta. Preferimos 20 creators bien-fit a 200 random. Responde al Mail 2 sí o sí.
